description: Ontology for a generic loaded dataset, covering dataset structure, records, fields, values, provenance, and quality assessment.

classes.name: Thing
classes.comment: Top-level root class for all entities in the ontology.

classes.name: InformationEntity
classes.comment: An abstract entity that represents information-bearing content.

classes.name: DatasetArtifact
classes.comment: A dataset as a managed information artifact.

classes.name: StructuredDataset
classes.comment: A dataset organized into records and fields.

classes.name: TabularDataset
classes.comment: A structured dataset represented in tabular form.

classes.name: LoadedDataset
classes.comment: A dataset that has been loaded into a system.

classes.name: DatasetVersion
classes.comment: A specific version or snapshot of a dataset.

classes.name: DatasetSchema
classes.comment: The structural definition of a dataset.

classes.name: SchemaComponent
classes.comment: A component of a dataset schema.

classes.name: FieldDefinition
classes.comment: Definition of a field or column in a dataset.

classes.name: KeyFieldDefinition
classes.comment: A field definition that identifies records uniquely.

classes.name: DerivedFieldDefinition
classes.comment: A field definition computed from other fields.

classes.name: RecordStructure
classes.comment: Definition of a record structure in the dataset.

classes.name: DataRecord
classes.comment: A single record or row in a dataset.

classes.name: LoadedRecord
classes.comment: A record that has been loaded from the source dataset.

classes.name: ValidatedRecord
classes.comment: A loaded record that has passed validation checks.

classes.name: FieldValue
classes.comment: A value associated with a field in a record.

classes.name: AtomicValue
classes.comment: A single, indivisible field value.

classes.name: TextValue
classes.comment: A textual field value.

classes.name: NumericValue
classes.comment: A numeric field value.

classes.name: BooleanValue
classes.comment: A boolean field value.

classes.name: TemporalValue
classes.comment: A date or date-time field value.

classes.name: MetadataEntity
classes.comment: Metadata describing the dataset or its processing.

classes.name: ProvenanceRecord
classes.comment: A provenance description for a dataset or record.

classes.name: LoadEvent
classes.comment: An event describing the loading of a dataset.

classes.name: ValidationEvent
classes.comment: An event describing validation of data.

classes.name: QualityAssessment
classes.comment: An assessment of dataset quality.

classes.name: CompletenessAssessment
classes.comment: Assessment of missingness or completeness.

classes.name: ConsistencyAssessment
classes.comment: Assessment of internal consistency.

classes.name: QualityIssue
classes.comment: A detected issue affecting data quality.

object_properties.name: hasVersion
object_properties.comment: Links a dataset artifact to one of its versions.

object_properties.name: versionOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the dataset artifact that a version belongs to.

object_properties.name: hasSchema
object_properties.comment: Associates a dataset with its schema.

object_properties.name: schemaOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the dataset described by a schema.

object_properties.name: hasFieldDefinition
object_properties.comment: Links a schema to its field definitions.

object_properties.name: fieldDefinitionOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the schema that contains a field definition.

object_properties.name: hasRecord
object_properties.comment: Links a loaded dataset to its records.

object_properties.name: recordOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the loaded dataset that contains a record.

object_properties.name: hasValue
object_properties.comment: Links a record to one of its field values.

object_properties.name: valueOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the record that a field value belongs to.

object_properties.name: hasProvenance
object_properties.comment: Links a dataset to provenance information.

object_properties.name: provenanceOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the dataset described by provenance information.

object_properties.name: hasAssessment
object_properties.comment: Links a dataset to a quality assessment.

object_properties.name: assessmentOf
object_properties.comment: Indicates the dataset that was assessed.

data_properties.name: fieldName
data_properties.comment: Name of a field or column.

data_properties.name: fieldIndex
data_properties.comment: Position of a field in the dataset.

data_properties.name: recordIndex
data_properties.comment: Position or row number of a record.

data_properties.name: textLiteral
data_properties.comment: String content of a text value.

data_properties.name: numericLiteral
data_properties.comment: Numeric content of a numeric value.

data_properties.name: booleanLiteral
data_properties.comment: Boolean content of a boolean value.

data_properties.name: temporalLiteral
data_properties.comment: Temporal content of a date or date-time value.

data_properties.name: issueSeverity
data_properties.comment: Severity level of a quality issue.

data_properties.name: assessmentScore
data_properties.comment: Numeric score assigned by a quality assessment.
